node.content-desc: , Calendar, View and manage your schedule, 

!, expo-notifications: Android Push notifications (remote notifications) functionality provided by expo-notifications was removed from Expo Go with the release of SDK 53. Use a development build instead of Expo Go. Read more at https://docs.expo.dev/develop/development-builds/introduction/.

node.text: expo-notifications: Android Push notifications (remote notifications) functionality provided by expo-notifications was removed from Expo Go with the release of SDK 53. Use a development build instead of Expo Go. Read more at https://docs.expo.dev/develop/development-builds/introduction/.
